title: Concordia learners win in national art competition
description: KNYSNA - Concordia Primary School is filled...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA - Concordia Primary School is filled with pride as two of its talented learners, Irah Moos (Grade 2) and Hope Trotter (Grade 5), secured top honours in the 2025 National Science Week Art Competition, a prestigious national event that attracted entries from schools across South Africa.","html":"KNYSNA - Concordia Primary School is filled with pride as two of its talented learners, Irah Moos (Grade 2) and Hope Trotter (Grade 5), secured top honours in the 2025 National Science Week Art Competition, a prestigious national event that attracted entries from schools across South Africa."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The competition was hosted by the UWC Science Learning Centre, which invited learners nationwide to explore the theme “The Unique Role of Water” through visual art."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this week's edition of Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this week's edition of Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Concordia learners win in national art competition
